news.title: NRG: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
news.summary: HOUSTON (AP) — NRG Energy Inc. NRG) on Tuesday reported earnings of $66 million in its fourth quarter. On a per-share basis, the Houston-based company said it had profit of 26 cents.

news.title: How Investors May Respond To NRG (NRG) Earnings Beat, LS Power Deal And Buyback Plan
news.summary: NRG Energy reported full-year 2025 results with sales rising to US$30,713 million while net income and earnings per share from continuing operations declined compared with 2024. Alongside a strong fourth quarter that exceeded expectations, NRG doubled its generation capacity through the LS Power acquisition and authorized a multi-billion-dollar share repurchase, underscoring a major shift toward larger scale and capital returns.
